mapper.select: SELECT dma.id, dma.user_id, dma.room_id, dma.apartment_id, dma.landlord_id, dma.name, dma.phone, dma.identification_number, dma.email, dma.emergency_contact, dma.emergency_phone, dma.lease_start_date, dma.lease_end_date, dma.lease_term_id, dma.rent, dma.deposit, dma.payment_type_id, dma.status, dma.processor_id, dma.processor_type, dma.rejection_reason, dma.processed_at, dma.additional_info, dma.create_time, dma.update_time, -- 关联信息 ri.room_number, ai.name as apartment_name, lt.name as lease_term_name, pt.name as payment_type_name, CASE WHEN dma.processor_type = 1 THEN su.name WHEN dma.processor_type = 2 THEN ui.nickname ELSE NULL END as processor_name, -- 房间图片URL（取第一张图片，item_type=2表示房间图片） (SELECT gi.url FROM graph_info gi WHERE gi.item_type = 2 AND gi.item_id = ri.id AND gi.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1) as room_graph_url FROM direct_move_in_application dma LEFT JOIN room_info ri ON dma.room_id = ri.id AND ri.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN apartment_info ai ON dma.apartment_id = ai.id AND ai.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN lease_term lt ON dma.lease_term_id = lt.id AND lt.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN payment_type pt ON dma.payment_type_id = pt.id AND pt.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN system_user su ON dma.processor_id = su.id AND dma.processor_type = 1 LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON dma.processor_id = ui.id AND dma.processor_type = 2 WHERE dma.status = 1 AND dma.landlord_id = #{landlordId} AND dma.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY dma.create_time DESC

SELECT dma.id, dma.user_id, dma.room_id, dma.apartment_id, dma.landlord_id, dma.name, dma.phone, dma.identification_number, dma.email, dma.emergency_contact, dma.emergency_phone, dma.lease_start_date, dma.lease_end_date, dma.lease_term_id, dma.rent, dma.deposit, dma.payment_type_id, dma.status, dma.processor_id, dma.processor_type, dma.rejection_reason, dma.processed_at, dma.additional_info, dma.create_time, dma.update_time, -- 关联信息 ri.room_number, ai.name as apartment_name, lt.name as lease_term_name, pt.name as payment_type_name, CASE WHEN dma.processor_type = 1 THEN su.name WHEN dma.processor_type = 2 THEN ui.nickname ELSE NULL END as processor_name, -- 房间图片URL（取第一张图片，item_type=2表示房间图片） (SELECT gi.url FROM graph_info gi WHERE gi.item_type = 2 AND gi.item_id = ri.id AND gi.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1) as room_graph_url FROM direct_move_in_application dma LEFT JOIN room_info ri ON dma.room_id = ri.id AND ri.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN apartment_info ai ON dma.apartment_id = ai.id AND ai.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN lease_term lt ON dma.lease_term_id = lt.id AND lt.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN payment_type pt ON dma.payment_type_id = pt.id AND pt.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN system_user su ON dma.processor_id = su.id AND dma.processor_type = 1 LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON dma.processor_id = ui.id AND dma.processor_type = 2 WHERE dma.landlord_id = #{landlordId} AND dma.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY dma.create_time DESC

SELECT dma.id, dma.user_id, dma.room_id, dma.apartment_id, dma.landlord_id, dma.name, dma.phone, dma.identification_number, dma.email, dma.emergency_contact, dma.emergency_phone, dma.lease_start_date, dma.lease_end_date, dma.lease_term_id, dma.rent, dma.deposit, dma.payment_type_id, dma.status, dma.processor_id, dma.processor_type, dma.rejection_reason, dma.processed_at, dma.additional_info, dma.create_time, dma.update_time, -- 关联信息 ri.room_number, ai.name as apartment_name, lt.name as lease_term_name, pt.name as payment_type_name, CASE WHEN dma.processor_type = 1 THEN su.name WHEN dma.processor_type = 2 THEN ui.nickname ELSE NULL END as processor_name, -- 房间图片URL（取第一张图片，item_type=2表示房间图片） (SELECT gi.url FROM graph_info gi WHERE gi.item_type = 2 AND gi.item_id = ri.id AND gi.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1) as room_graph_url FROM direct_move_in_application dma LEFT JOIN room_info ri ON dma.room_id = ri.id AND ri.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN apartment_info ai ON dma.apartment_id = ai.id AND ai.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN lease_term lt ON dma.lease_term_id = lt.id AND lt.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN payment_type pt ON dma.payment_type_id = pt.id AND pt.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN system_user su ON dma.processor_id = su.id AND dma.processor_type = 1 LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON dma.processor_id = ui.id AND dma.processor_type = 2 WHERE dma.id = #{id} AND dma.is_deleted = 0

SELECT dma.id, dma.user_id, dma.room_id, dma.apartment_id, dma.landlord_id, dma.name, dma.phone, dma.identification_number, dma.email, dma.emergency_contact, dma.emergency_phone, dma.lease_start_date, dma.lease_end_date, dma.lease_term_id, dma.rent, dma.deposit, dma.payment_type_id, dma.status, dma.processor_id, dma.processor_type, dma.rejection_reason, dma.processed_at, dma.additional_info, dma.create_time, dma.update_time, -- 关联信息 ri.room_number, ai.name as apartment_name, lt.name as lease_term_name, pt.name as payment_type_name, CASE WHEN dma.processor_type = 1 THEN su.name WHEN dma.processor_type = 2 THEN ui.nickname ELSE NULL END as processor_name, -- 房间图片URL（取第一张图片，item_type=2表示房间图片） (SELECT gi.url FROM graph_info gi WHERE gi.item_type = 2 AND gi.item_id = ri.id AND gi.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1) as room_graph_url FROM direct_move_in_application dma LEFT JOIN room_info ri ON dma.room_id = ri.id AND ri.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN apartment_info ai ON dma.apartment_id = ai.id AND ai.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN lease_term lt ON dma.lease_term_id = lt.id AND lt.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN payment_type pt ON dma.payment_type_id = pt.id AND pt.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN system_user su ON dma.processor_id = su.id AND dma.processor_type = 1 LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON dma.processor_id = ui.id AND dma.processor_type = 2 WHERE dma.user_id = #{userId} AND dma.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY dma.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM direct_move_in_application dma WHERE dma.landlord_id = #{landlordId} AND dma.is_deleted = 0
